security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self'; font-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Official DOM desktop wallet with an integrated node.
bundle.longDescription: DOM Wallet is the official desktop wallet for the DOM Protocol. It runs a full DOM node inside the application, shows live node logs, and lets you send and receive DOM. Not a store of value. A means of exchange.
